name: The Chrono-Resonance Cascade
description: Align the chrono-fluid flow and the gravity lock inside the optimal time window (between 200ms and 500ms) to trigger a resonance cascade and collapse the stasis field.

flaws.name: Initiate Chrono Pulse
flaws.flavor_text: Launch a chrono-fluid pulse. Aligning the next action with the pulse apex is critical.

flaws.name: Engage Gravity Lock
flaws.flavor_text: Engaging the gravity lock precisely at the chrono-fluid pulse apex (200-500ms) overrides the lock state, otherwise causing entropic feedback.
